mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( PYMT_NO, BILL_NO, IMP_UID, PAY_MTHD_CD, PAY_AMT, PAY_STTS_CD, PAY_REQ_DT, PAY_CMPL_DT, FAIL_RSN_CN, ORD_ID, USER_NO ) VALUES ( #{pymtNo}, #{billNo}, NULL, #{payMthdCd}, #{payAmt}, 'UNPAID', SYSDATE, NULL, NULL, #{ordId}, #{userNo} )
mapper.select:
SELECT P.PYMT_NO, P.BILL_NO, P.IMP_UID, P.PAY_MTHD_CD, P.PAY_AMT, P.PAY_STTS_CD, P.PAY_REQ_DT, P.PAY_CMPL_DT, P.FAIL_RSN_CN, P.ORD_ID, P.USER_NO,
M.CODE_NAME AS PAY_MTHD_NM, S.CODE_NAME AS PAY_STTS_NM,
B.BILL_YM, B.BILL_TOT_AMT, B.HO_NO,
U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO
FROM PAYMENT P JOIN BILL B ON P.BILL_NO = B.BILL_NO JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE M ON M.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'PAY_MET' AND M.CODE_NO_CD = P.PAY_MTHD_CD AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE S ON S.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'PAY_STTS' AND S.CODE_NO_CD = P.PAY_STTS_CD AND S.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE P.BILL_NO = #{billNo} ORDER BY P.PAY_REQ_DT DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BILL WHERE BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND PYMT_STTS_CD = 'PAID'

SELECT B.BILL_NO, B.BILL_YM, B.BILL_TOT_AMT, B.HO_NO,
U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO,
#{userNo} AS USER_NO
FROM BILL B JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO JOIN HSHLD_HEAD HH ON H.HO_NO = HH.HO_NO WHERE B.BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND HH.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND B.PYMT_STTS_CD != 'PAID'

SELECT P.PYMT_NO, P.BILL_NO, P.IMP_UID, P.PAY_MTHD_CD, P.PAY_AMT, P.PAY_STTS_CD, P.PAY_REQ_DT, P.PAY_CMPL_DT, P.FAIL_RSN_CN, P.ORD_ID, P.USER_NO,
M.CODE_NAME AS PAY_MTHD_NM, S.CODE_NAME AS PAY_STTS_NM,
B.BILL_YM, B.BILL_TOT_AMT, B.HO_NO,
U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO
FROM PAYMENT P JOIN BILL B ON P.BILL_NO = B.BILL_NO JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE M ON M.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'PAY_MET' AND M.CODE_NO_CD = P.PAY_MTHD_CD AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE S ON S.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'PAY_STTS' AND S.CODE_NO_CD = P.PAY_STTS_CD AND S.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE P.ORD_ID = #{ordId}
mapper.update: UPDATE PAYMENT SET IMP_UID = #{impUid}, PAY_STTS_CD = 'PAID', PAY_CMPL_DT = SYSDATE, FAIL_RSN_CN = NULL WHERE PYMT_NO = #{pymtNo} AND ORD_ID = #{ordId} AND PAY_STTS_CD = 'UNPAID'
mapper.select:
SELECT P.PYMT_NO, P.BILL_NO, P.IMP_UID, P.PAY_MTHD_CD, P.PAY_AMT, P.PAY_STTS_CD, P.PAY_REQ_DT, P.PAY_CMPL_DT, P.FAIL_RSN_CN, P.ORD_ID, P.USER_NO,
PM.CODE_NAME AS PAY_MTHD_NM, PS.CODE_NAME AS PAY_STTS_NM,
B.BILL_YM, B.BILL_TOT_AMT, B.HO_NO,
U.DONG_NM || '동 ' || H.HO || '호' AS DISPLAY_DONG_HO
FROM PAYMENT P JOIN BILL B ON P.BILL_NO = B.BILL_NO JOIN APT_DETAIL H ON B.HO_NO = H.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT U ON H.DONG_NO = U.DONG_NO JOIN HSHLD_HEAD HH ON H.HO_NO = HH.HO_NO
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE PM ON PM.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'PAY_MET' AND PM.CODE_NO_CD = P.PAY_MTHD_CD AND PM.USE_YN = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE PS ON PS.GROUP_CODE_NO = 'PAY_STTS' AND PS.CODE_NO_CD = P.PAY_STTS_CD AND PS.USE_YN = 'Y'
WHERE HH.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND SUBSTR(B.BILL_YM, 1, 4) = #{billYear} AND P.PAY_STTS_CD = 'PAID' AND B.PYMT_STTS_CD = 'PAID'
ORDER BY B.BILL_YM DESC, P.PAY_CMPL_DT DESC
